summary: Comprehensive testing of Bitsy AI booking assistant completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% pass rate, frontend pages load correctly but authentication flow and video player have integration issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Video source attribute returns None, demo video not loading in browser
Registration doesn't auto-redirect to dashboard after successful signup
Dashboard pages may not be loading correctly after registration/login

integration_issues.issue: Frontend authentication state management may have issues

passed_tests: Widget Booking Flow API (Both payment methods - Backend)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (6/8 critical flows working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication flow issues: 1) Demo video source not loading correctly on landing page, 2) Registration success should redirect to dashboard automatically, 3) Hotel dashboard pages (settings, bookings) need authentication state fixes to display correctly after login
